arts.ttl: Tottenham in early team news hint before Leicester City as Ange Postecoglou pressure mounts
arts.sum: The poor run of form has seen manager Postecoglou come under pressure, with Tottenham languishing in 15th place after 22 games. James Maddison has posted a pre-match graphic on his Instagram story, hinting that that he may start against Ruud van Nistelrooy's team.
